k8s-debug.description: Kubernetes troubleshooting -- from symptom to root cause

commands.comment: pods not in Running state -- the starting point
events section -- scheduling failures, image pulls, OOMs
logs from the previous crashed container
memory hogs -- approaching limits means OOMKill incoming
recent cluster events -- often reveals the actual problem
autoscaler status -- is it maxed out or thrashing?

commands.cmd: kubectl exec -it $POD -n $NAMESPACE -- sh -c 'wget -qO- http://localhost:$PORT/health || curl -sf http://localhost:$PORT/health'
commands.comment: health check from inside the pod -- bypasses ingress/service
